← Ontology

Disaster_Relief

Emergency preparedness, relief, and regenerative recovery after floods, fires, storms, and other shocks—centering affected communities, repairing ecosystems, and rebuilding social and physical systems

Parent item
33314415-10e1-8193-a321-cb34b431013f
long_description
Shocks will come; the question is whether response recenters affected people, repairs ecosystems, and rebuilds toward greater resilience. Preparedness, relief, and regenerative recovery treat disaster as a moment to reorganize social and physical systems—not only to return to a fragile baseline.
slug
Disaster_Relief
Activities
33314415-10e1-814d-8d43-e927aee5ba05
Description
Emergency preparedness, relief, and regenerative recovery after floods, fires, storms, and other shocks—centering affected communities, repairing ecosystems, and rebuilding social and physical systems for greater long‑term resilience.
parent_pattern_name
Services & Infrastructure
